overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas, passing by holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: futuristic black car drives through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella crosses from right to left in front of camera

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then beginning to cross the wet intersection

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car with glowing accents driving through the rain
pedestrian carrying a glowing purple illuminated umbrella walking across the street

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large vertical holographic advertisements and blue neon signage
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting on wet asphalt
short yellow and black striped safety posts at the curb edge
overhead street lighting fixtures emitting blue and white glow

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rain-soaked futuristic intersection at night, dominated by towering buildings with holographic advertisements. The player stands at a yellow zebra crossing as a black futuristic car drives past, then begins crossing as a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy crosswalk with pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas

events.description: ego moves through the middle of the intersection among a group of crossing pedestrians
reaching the opposite curb and transitioning from street to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection surrounded by other pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with glowing orange and purple illuminated umbrellas crossing together

entered.detail: row of blue illuminated vending machines with glowing screens lining the sidewalk
large concrete planter with tall palm trees on the street corner
elevated pedestrian bridge or building overhang spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player continues crossing the wide intersection, moving through a crowd of pedestrians carrying glowing neon umbrellas. The scene transitions from the open street to the sidewalk where blue vending machines and palm tree planters become visible, while the massive holographic billboard tower shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with vending machines and neon storefronts

events.description: large support pillar temporarily blocks the view of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated vending machines and palm trees, approaching the next intersection

entered.detail: glowing red and blue business signs and advertisements on building facades
thick structural column for the overhead walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered sidewalk, the player passes by glowing blue vending machines and palm trees in planters. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera moves under building overhangs, passing a large support pillar while neon storefront signs illuminate the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with multi-story parking and heavy traffic

events.description: group of pedestrians with glowing orange umbrellas begins crossing the street
silver sports car drives past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: crossing the second major intersection with a crowd of pedestrians then continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver futuristic sports car with glowing red taillights driving through the wet streets
pedestrians with glowing orange and red illuminated umbrellas crossing together

entered.detail: large multi-level parking garage with open levels and yellow accent lighting
line of parked futuristic cars along the curb with reflective surfaces
fresh yellow pedestrian crossing lines on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and crosses another major intersection, this time with a prominent multi-story parking structure on the right. A crowd of pedestrians with glowing orange umbrellas crosses alongside, while a silver sports car drives past. The scene transitions to a sidewalk lined with parked futuristic vehicles as the rain continues to fall on the neon-lit streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, moving from a wide, holographic-dominated intersection into the enclosed corridors of a neon-lit sidewalk before opening up to another bustling crossing. It begins at a yellow zebra crossing beneath towering holographic advertisements, where a black futuristic car speeds past as the camera moves forward alongside a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella. As the camera navigates through a crowd of neon umbrellas, the open street transitions into a covered sidewalk lined with blue vending machines and palm tree planters, shifting the massive billboard tower to the right of the frame. The environment then becomes more enclosed under building overhangs and support pillars, with vibrant storefront signs illuminating the path. Finally, the scene expands once more as the camera crosses a second major intersection past a multi-story parking structure and a silver sports car, ending on a sidewalk lined with parked futuristic vehicles under the persistent rain.
